The introduction covers the importance of safety alignment in LLMs and how it can be compromised by fine-tuning. It introduces the concept of the LLM safety landscape and the VI...
Summarizes the findings on the safety basin and VISAGE metric, emphasizing the importance of understanding the safety landscape for future LLM safety research.
Discusses the sensitivity of jailbreaking prompts to model weight perturbations and the implications for LLM safety and defense strategies.
